title: widetable overflow
text: widetable overflow Sets the length of overflow table segments to 8000 characters. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = widetable overflow Description The maximum field length is 8000 characters. Normally the maximum field length and the overflow segment size would be expected to be the same. However, for backward compatibility with databases created with earlier Sybase connectors, the default segment size of overflow tables is 255 characters. You can use this option to increase the overflow segment size from the default 255 characters to 8000 characters. Related Links Table Management on Sybase The Sybase connector maps Uniface entities to Sybase tables. When Uniface entities are created on the fly or via the Create Table facility, a Sybase table, its indexes, and a group of stored procedures are also created. The connector can also be used to map Uniface entities to Sybase views. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
